name: Close
highlight_text: Best for: Outbound sales and high call volume
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__Source: Close

What Close Does

Close is made for teams that do high-touch outbound: calls, SMS, and emails, all inside the CRM. If part of your agency has aggressive lead gen outreach, Close is a solid pick. It’s pretty widely used as well.

Key Features

  • Power dialer & automated call sequences
  • Email & SMS integration per lead
  • Visual pipelines
  • Custom reporting & dashboards
  • Webhooks, API, integrations

Pricing

  • Essentials: $35/user/month
  • Growth: $99/user/month
  • Scale: $139/user/month
  • Custom pricing for larger teams

Pros

✅ Best-in-class call + SMS inside CRM (Great visibility into how communication correlates with deals)
✅ Clean and focused pipeline view
✅ Intuitive and simple to use

Cons

🚫 Advanced reporting & analytics are locked to higher plans
🚫 Not ideal if your agency is 100% inbound or doesn’t use high outreach volume
🚫 Many users report missing features and customization (such as the persistent need for manual inputs and lack of customization with reporting)

‍
what_people_say:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Customers Say

“It helps us reach more people with mass campaigns, and at the same time, we can send quick one-to-one emails right after a call using templates. This way, we can follow the 3M strategy faster and more easily.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
